title: AI Trust & Safety Digest
tagline: A curated current snapshot of AI trust, safety, and governance, including as many materially important fresh items as the day warrants.
lead: Today’s strongest trust-and-safety signal comes from evaluation and security work rather than policy or lab disclosures. The fresh papers focus on how to audit public frontier-model benchmarks, detect behavioral signatures in coding agents, and reassess assumptions about privacy-preserving federated learning, with several additional contributions on reliability and alignment measurement.

items.title: Differential privacy in federated learning may still permit effective backdoor attacks
items.why_it_matters: Challenges a common safety assumption that privacy mechanisms also improve robustness against model poisoning.

items.title: Public frontier-model evaluation archives get a Bayesian audit framework
items.why_it_matters: Offers a method to interpret benchmark histories as evidence, not just leaderboards.

items.title: Researchers propose fingerprinting coding agents through their action trajectories
items.why_it_matters: Could improve agent oversight by identifying behavioral patterns beyond final benchmark scores.

items.title: Post-hoc falsification study examines reliability fixes for frozen small code models
items.why_it_matters: Targets practical error detection and repair for local models used in privacy-constrained settings.

items.title: TuneJury introduces an open metric for music-generation preference alignment
items.why_it_matters: Adds open alignment infrastructure for measuring model outputs against human preferences.

items.title: Benchmark built to test LLM agents on meta-analysis workflows
items.why_it_matters: Creates a more verifiable evaluation setting for scientific reasoning and evidence synthesis agents.

note: Selected from recent trust-and-safety relevant posts and papers by labs, evaluators, standards bodies, policy organizations, and arXiv, then summarized with GPT-5.4. Includes as many materially important fresh items as the day warrants.
